title: Next Nature Museum and Waag Futurelab launch annual Design Debat
content: The Next Nature Museum and Waag Futurelab are joining forces for the Design Debate, the annual platform for critical reflection on the role of design in an evolving technological world.
creator: info@waag.org (Waag)

title: Next Nature Museum and Waag Futurelab launch the National Design Debate
content: The Next Nature Museum and Waag Futurelab are joining forces for the National Design Debate, the annual platform for critical reflection on the role of design in an evolving technological world.
creator: info@waag.org (Waag)

title: Fabricademy show
content: Come and join us for the tenth edition of the Fabricademy graduation show at Waag Futurelab!
creator: info@waag.org (Waag)

title: Next Nature Museum en Waag Futurelab lanceren gezamenlijk Design Debat
content: Het Next Nature Museum en Waag Futurelab bundelen hun krachten voor het Design Debat, het jaarlijkse platform voor kritische reflectie op de rol van design in een technologisch veranderende wereld.
creator: info@waag.org (Waag)

title: Gezocht voor workshop: (lokale) ambtenaren die werken met data, AI of algoritmen
content: Voor het project Algo-Resist organiseren Tilburg University en Waag Futurelab twee workshops voor gemeente ambtenaren over manieren om weerstand te bieden tegen mogelijk problematische toepassingen van technologie.
creator: info@waag.org (Waag)

title: Det Digit Art House Launch
content: This evening we will celebrate the launch of the Det Digit Art House, with an in-depth programme on Det Digit's artistic legacy, regenerative technology and digital art.
creator: info@waag.org (Waag)

title: Closing the digital divide
content: Waag Futurelab researched how and why digital inequality exists in Amsterdam. Read the research.
creator: info@waag.org (Waag)

title: Lokale Verbindingen
content: Lokale Verbindingen is a guide for civil servants and social organisations to improve communication about the (digital) support available to you.
creator: info@waag.org (Waag)

title: Apply now for a 2-week residency at Waag's TextileLab
content: Are you a natural dye specialist curious about digital technologies? Or a textile designer eager to experiment with printing using natural dyes? Apply now for the Tracks4Crafts residency.
creator: info@waag.org (Waag)

title: The making of: 100% Amsterdams textiel
content: Hoe wordt Amsterdams textiel gemaakt? Bekijk het hele proces
creator: info@waag.org (Waag)

title: PublicSpaces conference 2026
content: A digital public space is essential for a healthy democratic society. During the sixth edition of the PublicSpaces conference, we will explore how the digital public space can be shaped based on democratic values.
creator: info@waag.org (Waag)

title: Waag explores and designs alternative forms of social media
content: Waag launched Public Nodes: an ambitious programme to regain control of our social media platforms.
creator: info@waag.org (Waag)

title: Back in time: AmsterdamREALTIME
content: <html><head></head><body></body></html>
creator: info@waag.org (Waag)

title: The traces of the Nieuwmarkt
content: <html><head></head><body></body></html>
creator: info@waag.org (Waag)

title: Ethical clay hardware
content: How can you make hardware without harming people or planet? Join the Feminist Hacking collective in this workshop to create ethical hardware made from natural clay and recycled hardware.
creator: info@waag.org (Waag)

title: The emergence of public moderation
content: Waag researched the roles and responsibilities civil society organisations can have in moderating social media, specifically in the context of the federated internet, or the fediverse. Read the research report.
creator: info@waag.org (Waag)

title: Een routekaart voor democratische technologie
content: De routekaart voor democratische technologie is een praktische gids die beschrijft hoe Amsterdam democratische technologie kan versterken door te leren van en samen te werken met de gemeenschapseconomie.
creator: info@waag.org (Waag)

title: Movies that Matter On Tour: Artificial Justice
content: On Wednesday 25 February, the film Artificial Justice will be screened as part of the Movies that Matter On Tour programme. After the screening, there will be a Q&A with researcher Zoénie Deng from Waag Futurelab.
creator: info@waag.org (Waag)

title: Closing the Loop: S+T+ARTS Prize Excellence Pathways
content: For many years, Waag has contributed to the organising, awarding and disseminating of the S+T+ARTS Prize, the European award for artistic excellence and innovative collaborations. With Closing the Loop, Waag presents a structural analysis of the impact of the S+T+ARTS Prize in the past 8 years.
creator: info@waag.org (Waag)

title: Apply for a journalistic residency at Waag Futurelab
content: Are you a journalist and interested in researching the influence of big tech on our information provision? Apply for a journalistic residency at Waag!
creator: info@waag.org (Waag)

title: Water carries, and water lives: how art-science projects connect people around water stories
content: What does water carry to the port of Amsterdam? During the residencies artsts Michael Pinsky and Arcangelo Constantini investigated the water infrastructure surrounding the Dommel river (Utrecht) and the Port of Amsterdam.
creator: info@waag.org (Waag)

title: Citizens measure air quality on Tata Steel factory site
content: Starting today, residents of the IJmond region will be measuring air quality at the Tata Steel factory site themselves. The sensor is the first of four sensors to be installed on the Tata Steel factory site.
creator: info@waag.org (Waag)
